title: FISGA
subtitle: Brand identity for a multidisciplinary arts, fitness and events space
intro: FISGA is a Lisbon-based space where fitness, music, art and community converge. The Warehouse hosts events; the Garden is a space to train. A bold, modular brand system was built to hold both worlds — and the many events, installations and collaborations that happen within them.
challenge: Design a brand flexible enough to serve a wellness studio, a warehouse events venue and a curated arts programme — all under one identity — without feeling generic.
approach: An isometric geometric logomark creates immediate spatial depth, referencing architecture and structure. Two bold sub-brand colours (blue for Warehouse, yellow for Garden) allow the identity to flex across radically different contexts while staying unmistakably FISGA.
outcome: A coherent identity that scales from signage and floor maps to social event posters. The geometric mark and colour system give FISGA a strong visual voice across every touchpoint.

hotspots.label: Colour System
hotspots.title: Warehouse Blue
hotspots.body: Sub-brand colours split across venues — blue for the Warehouse events space, yellow for the Garden training zone.
